/usr/bin/g++ -g "CMakeFiles/tape_test.dir/tests/test-default.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tape_test.dir/tests/test-file-tape.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tape_test.dir/tests/test-sorter.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tape_test.dir/src/file-tape.cpp.o" -o tape_test  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libboost_unit_test_framework.so.1.88.0
